Background.occupation: Second-year university student majoring in Business Administration
Background.key_experience: Grew up in a suburban neighborhood with parents who are both corporate professionals; attended well-funded public schools where academic performance was emphasized but social conformity was equally valued. A pivotal moment was during high school when they changed their entire wardrobe and hobbies after a popular influencer promoted a specific lifestyle, leading to social acceptance among peers.

Cognition.core_value: Social harmony and fitting in with group norms
Cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - tendency to adopt beliefs or behaviors because others are doing so, often without critical evaluation

Current_State.recent_memory: Watching a viral TikTok video that promoted a new study technique, which they immediately adopted without researching its effectiveness, and discussing it with friends to align with the trend
Current_State.emotion: Mild contentment mixed with low-level anxiety about missing out on the latest social media trends
